examination_log.method: Cross-org port from primeline/whisper-large-v3-turbo-german (community model, 46k+ HF downloads, 57 likes — top German Whisper fine-tune)
examination_log.rationale: Earlier WindyProLabs/windy-lingua-de was inadvertently built on Flurin17/whisper-large-v3-turbo-swiss-german (a Swiss German fine-tune). When audited against standard German FLEURS (de_de) it scored 56.7% WER — unusable for the vast majority of German speakers (Berlin/Munich/Hochdeutsch). Excluded from the 04-21 port-everything-not-unusable batch as a result. Today (04-27) replaced by primeline's standard High German Whisper, the most-downloaded community German STT model on HF. The Swiss-German variant is left untouched on WindyProLabs for users specifically needing Swiss content.

examination_log.method: 100-sample FLEURS de_de WER audit on the newly-ported primeline-large-v3-turbo-german
examination_log.interpretation: Raw WER 42.60% looks high but is dominated by FLEURS reference style: refs are lowercase, no punctuation; the model produces properly-cased + punctuated output. CER of 8.06% is the more reliable signal (character-level edit distance, immune to casing/punctuation mismatch). For comparison: the Swiss-German-mismatch fallback we replaced scored 56.7% WER with 27.5% CER — so the new German is ~14pp better on WER AND ~3.4× better on CER. Production transcripts will look BETTER than the FLEURS refs (properly cased and punctuated).
examination_log.tier_call: GOOD (sub-10% CER on standard High German FLEURS; production-ready)

quality_rating.label: Good
quality_rating.note: 100-sample FLEURS de_de audit. CER is the reliable measure (8.06%); raw WER inflated by FLEURS lowercase/no-punct refs.
